comment.text: This translation key is used to display an error message when a field is empty. It appears on the "Attribute Mapping" page as part of a form, specifically under fields marked as required (e.g., FirstName).

usage.context:
<div className="ldap_attribute-mapping">
 <FieldContainer
 style={FIELD_STYLE}
 isVertical
 labelVisible
 errorMessage={t("Common:EmptyFieldError")}
 hasError={errors.firstName}
 labelText={t("Common:FirstName")}
 isRequired
 dataTestId="first_name_field_container"
 >

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Lao translation 'ຊ່ອງວ່າງ' means 'space' or 'gap' (as in a physical gap or a whitespace character), whereas the English 'Empty field' in this context refers to a form field that has not been filled out. The translation should indicate that the field is empty/blank.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: ຊ່ອງຂໍ້ມູນຫວ່າງ

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation is incomplete; it ends with a trailing space and is missing the noun 'pole' (field) to complete the phrase 'Prázdne pole'.
